summary: Recent Statistics graduate from the University of Edinburgh with hands-on experience in Python, R, and SQL. Completed a dissertation on predictive modelling for NHS patient readmission using real hospital data. Gained practical data science exposure through a summer internship at Monzo, including building dashboards and analysing large transaction datasets. Strong communicator with experience presenting technical findings to non-technical audiences.

experience.title: Associate Data Scientist — Intern
bullets: Analysed customer transaction data (2M+ rows) using Python and pandas to identify spending segments and behavioural patterns
Built a Tableau dashboard to track weekly customer acquisition funnel metrics, used by the product team for decision-making
Wrote SQL queries in BigQuery to extract cohort-level retention and engagement data for product analysis
Presented findings on dormant account reactivation strategies to a 15-person cross-functional product team

experience.company: University of Edinburgh — School of Mathematics
experience.title: Undergraduate Research Assistant
bullets: Developed predictive model for patient readmission rates using logistic regression and random forest in R (tidyverse) as part of an NHS Lothian research collaboration
Cleaned and merged 3 anonymised NHS datasets comprising 45K patient records, resolving missing values and date inconsistencies
Achieved AUC of 0.78 on held-out test set and presented results at the university statistics symposium
Co-authored poster accepted at Royal Statistical Society conference (2025)
